title: Lod
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Lod.jpg]] |name=Lod |homeworld= |birth= |death=Before [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]],{{CSWECite|II|259|Lod}} [[Unidentified planet (Finn)|unidentified planet]]{{Tales|17|The Apprentice (comic story)}} |species=[[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Green (disambiguation)|Green]] |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Excuse me, but would you be interested in another servant? I'm prepared to be quite reasonable.|Lod, to Finn and his apprentice|}} '''Lod''' was a [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] master who owned a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] female named [[Marka]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Sith Wars]]. The two encountered the [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]] [[Finn (Sith)|Finn]] and [[Finn's Sith apprentice|his apprentice]] after they destroyed a building on the [[Unidentified planet (Finn)|planet]]. He instructed Marka to impress the Sith in an attempt to sell her to them. When she refused, Lod struck Marka, knocking her to the ground. Lod then conversed with Finn and insulted the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], which angered the young man. The apprentice [[Death/Legends|murdered]] Lod, freeing Marka from slavery. ==Biography== {{Quote|You will not strike her again. Ever."''
"''Your slave has a bit of a temper, ''eh''?"''
"''I'm no slave!|Finn's Sith apprentice and Lod|}} Lod, a [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], lived during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Sith Wars]]. As a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] master, he subjugated a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] female named [[Marka]]. Lod and Marka met the [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]] [[Finn (Sith)|Finn]] and [[Finn's Sith apprentice|his apprentice]] after they destroyed a building on the [[Unidentified planet (Finn)|planet]]. Lod attempted to offer Marka to the two Sith, instructing the woman to impress them by showing them her [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. After she refused, Lod hit Marka, which knocked her down to the ground. As Lod talked with Finn, he called the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] a slave, which enraged the young man. Finn's pupil [[Death/Legends|murdered]] Lod, freeing Marka from the Toydarian's bondage. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Marka, show the gentlemen your teeth."''
"''No, Master Lod."''
"''You will do what your master says!|Lod and Marka|}} [[File:Marka2.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Lod owned Marka as a slave.]] The Toydarian male Lod physically punished Marka when she disobeyed his order to impress Finn and his Sith apprentice. He assumed that Finn's pupil was the man's slave. ==Behind the scenes== Lod first appeared in the short [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[The Apprentice (comic story)|The Apprentice]]," which was featured in [[Star Wars Tales 17|''Star Wars Tales'' 17]] and written by [[Mike Denning]]. In the comic, he was drawn by [[David Nakayama]]. The story was later compiled into a trade paperback version and republished in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 5]]''. Plausible stories in [[Star Wars Tales 1|''Star Wars Tales'' 1]]–''[[Star Wars Tales 20|20]]'' were initially viewed as [[Canon|S-canon]] until referenced in a non-''Tales'' source, at which point the subject matter was elevated to C-canon status.{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=752#14952461|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-06-04|time=3:05 AM}} Lod later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', which raised the character's appearance in ''The Apprentice'' to C-canon. ==Appearances== *{{Tales|17|The Apprentice (comic story)}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Lod |pl=Lod }} [[Category:Enslavers]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Toydarians]]
